name: Blue Corn Blueberry Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Am Llano Extra Fine Blue Cornmeal
1 cup Am Llano Unbleached White Flour
1/4 cup Am Llano Unrefined Vegetable Oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together the dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, combine the liquid ingredients.
3. Pour the liquid mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
4. Gently fold in the blueberries.
5. Divide the batter evenly among prepared muffin tins, filling each about 2/3 full.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 20 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center of a muffin comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool in the pan for a few minutes before removing from the pan.
